DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MIDLINE DBA LAVATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF MATTHEW GRAMLY WITH REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS: MOTION GRANTED IN PART. AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY 14.1, PLAINTIFF GRAMLY SHALL PROVIDE AN AMENDED RESPONSE THAT SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFIES THE CODES OR ORDINANCES HE CONTENDS THAT DEFENDANTS VIOLATED. AS TO INTERROGATORY NO. 5, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE AN AMENDED RESPONSES LISTING ALL OF THE SF CITY DEPARTMENTS THAT HE CONTACTED REGARDING THE NOISE ISSUES. AS TO THE VARIOUS RFPDS, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A PRIVILEGE LOG OF ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD ON THE BASIS OF PRIVILEGE. AS TO RFPD NO. 9, PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS OR INDICATE THAT HE DOES NOT POSSESS THEM. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE REMAINDER OF PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES ARE SUFFICIENT. THE COURT AWARDS SANCTIONS OF $250 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND TO THE DISCOVERY NECESSITATED DEFENDANTS TO FILE THIS MOTION AND INCUR COSTS. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE BY JUNE 10, 2019. SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO BE PROVIDED BY JUNE 10, 2019. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO DAVIDMCDONALD@PRODIGY.NET JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff Anna Maria Garcia With Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MIDLINE DBA LAVATION's Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff Anna Maria Garcia With Request For Sanctions

Subsequent to the filing of this motion, Plaintiff Garcia served responses to the discovery at issue. The Court awards $125 in sanctions because Plaintiff's failure to timely respond to the discovery necessitated Defendants to file this motion and incur costs. Sanctions are payable by June 10, 2019.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to davidmcdonald@prodigy.net

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Matthew Gramly With Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MIDLINE DBA LAVATION's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Matthew Gramly With Request For Sanctions

Motion granted in part. As to Form Interrogatory 14.1, Plaintiff Gramly shall provide an amended response that specifically identifies the codes or ordinances he contends that Defendants violated. As to Interrogatory No. 5, Plaintiff shall provide an amended responses listing all of the SF City departments that he contacted regarding the noise issues. As to the various RFPDs, Plaintiff shall provide a privilege log of any documents withheld on the basis of privilege. As to RFPD No. 9, Plaintiff shall produce any responsive documents or indicate that he does not possess them. The Court finds that the remainder of Plaintiff's responses are sufficient. The Court awards sanctions of $250 because Plaintiff's failure to timely respond to the discovery necessitated Defendants to file this motion and incur costs. Sanctions are payable by June 10, 2019. Supplemental responses to be provided by June 10, 2019.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to davidmcdonald@prodigy.net

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
